title: CEAT Tyres Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: CEAT Tyres Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
CEAT Tyres Capital India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About CEAT Tyres Capital India:
CEAT Tyres Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres Capital India!
